## What is Top Producer?

Top Producer is one of the oldest names in real estate CRM and has been reworked for 2026 around smart drip campaigns, MLS-driven farming, and an AI-assisted follow-up coach. The current product ships six pricing tiers — a single-agent Pro plan, two lead/farming add-on bundles, and three team plans sized for 5, 10, or 25 agents.

## Who is it for?

Agents and teams with established books of business who want marketing-to-farming automation tied to their MLS. The per-user price is higher than Wise Agent or Realvolve, so it rewards agents whose transaction volume justifies the spend.

## Strengths

- **Smart drip campaigns** — behavior-aware sequences that adapt to what contacts actually engage with.
- **Farming add-on** — targeted outreach to a specific geography with predictive "likely to sell" scoring from MLS data.
- **Transaction management** — close checklists, task tracking, and document handling baked in.
- **Team plans** — dedicated tiers for 5/10/25-agent teams with consolidated reporting.
- **Long history and integrations** — mature partner ecosystem, especially around lead providers and IDX.

## What to consider

- Pro plan at $179/user/mo is expensive for a solo agent relative to flat-rate competitors.
- Add-on model (Pro + Leads, Pro + Farming) makes the real monthly cost hard to predict until you've priced everything.
- UI is dated compared to newer entrants like Lofty or BoldTrail.
- Limited true AI features — automation is heavy on rules, lighter on model-driven recommendations.

## Bottom line

Top Producer is a solid, established pick for agents who value farming and drip marketing over an all-in-one platform. Run the numbers carefully with the add-ons included — it's easy to land closer to $300–$500/month once you've got leads and farming turned on.
